connection_state.h(3) Library Functions Manual connection_state.h(3)

NAME

connection_state.h - Connection state machine for client TCP/WebSocket connections.

SYNOPSIS

Detailed Description

Connection state machine for client TCP/WebSocket connections.

Re-exports the public connection attempt API from lib/network. This is a compatibility header for client mode code that previously had local definitions. All functionality has been moved to lib/network.

Date

January 2026

Version

2.0

Definition in file connection_state.h.
